Bhairav Ra Taabar organized a successful Free Buttermilk Distribution Drive (Chaas Vitran Seva) today to bring relief to commuters and locals. ✨ ​A huge thank you to all the volunteers, youth members, and residents who stepped forward to support this noble cause and spread the message of harmony and humanity! Let’s keep the spirit of community service alive. ❤️ ​ Location: Venkatesh Park, Near MTNL, Close to Maharaja Sweets, Bhayandar West. ​ "Donating a glass of buttermilk — The greatest service to humanity!"  "The pledge of Bhairav Ra Taabar — Service, Values, and Harmony!" #mirabhayandar buttermilk bhayandar #bhayandarwest #bhayanderwest
